reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: Trusted by hundreds of happy clients in Ilioupoli.

review1.name: Maria Pischos
review1.text: Very clean, very professional and great prices. Nice selection of colors and on time!

review2.name: Konstantina
review2.text: I visited for eyebrow shaping. I don't usually trust people easily with this, but the work was amazing and I was very satisfied with the result. I recommend it without reservation!

review3.name: Koula A
review3.text: The best I've ever visited. Excellent work without shortcuts, no drill which for me is very important, no rush. I've already booked my next appointment.

review4.name: Melpo Makromalli
review4.text: A little diamond in the heart of Ilioupoli! Every time I visit this place I feel like I'm truly being taken care of.

review5.name: Verified Client
review5.text: Thank you so much! The manicure, which in my case is difficult, was perfect.

review6.name: Evangelia G.
review6.text: Beautiful space, clean and the staff always very polite! Flawless manicure-pedicure and the best eyebrow shaping service in Ilioupoli! I recommend without reservation!

cta.title: Ready for your next appointment?

highlights.title: A little diamond in the heart of Ilioupoli

specialties.title: Specialised in
specialties.text: Manicures, pedicures, nail enhancements, threading & wax hair removal, semi-permanent polish and eyebrow microblading.

team.title: Our team
team.text: We take the time each client needs, so you leave happy and renewed.

transit.title: Getting here
transit.bus: Right by the bus stops on Plateia Ethnikis Antistaseos.
transit.metro: A 15-minute walk from "Ilioupoli / Grigoris Lambrakis" metro station.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Located in the heart of Ilioupoli, 4 Your Nails has been providing exceptional nail care and beauty services since 2015, with a commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.
story.text2: Our team of skilled professionals is passionate about making every client feel pampered and beautiful. From classic manicures to creative nail art, we bring precision, care, and creativity to every service.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the talented professionals behind your perfect nails and eyebrows. Our team takes the time each client needs, so you leave our space happy and renewed.

ContactPage.title: Visit Us
ContactPage.subtitle: We'd love to see you. Book online or drop by our salon.
